name: DEBUG DEADLINE
short_description: The main character is hired as a debugger at the game company “Dokidoki Games”! With a time limit of one week, will he be able to find the bug safely? The debugging work with fate on the line begins now!
detailed_description:
《Debug DeadLine》

This is a first-person horror comedy game set in a Japanese debugging company.

The player takes on the role of a part-time worker at a debugging company, tasked with testing a horror game brimming with terrifying elements.

When you encounter suspicious objects or systems that don’t seem to belong in a horror game, report them as bugs immediately!

Your intuition, powers of observation, and gaming sense will be the keys to uncovering hidden bugs!

《Story》
The protagonist is hired as a debugging staff member for a game company called "Dokidoki Games."
Their assignment? Testing a horror game set for release!

What awaits them is an overwhelming storm of bugs beyond imagination!
Somehow, elements from other games have found their way into the testing stages, creating a chaotic atmosphere!

With just one week on the clock, can the protagonist safely track down all the bugs?
The debug work that will determine their fate starts now!

《Playtime》

Collecting all endings (multiple endings):

Approximately 1 to 2 hours

《Voice Actor》

■Player・Other

Ve

■Takahashi

Atusaki Yuma

■Sugimachi

Setsugecka

■Yoko

Kojyo Rin

■Secret

Yurihara Kakuyu

NasuAkio

Suzuki Saya

Sendo Tomori

《Streaming Guidelines》

  • Permission for Streaming: This game can be streamed freely by both individuals and organizations, without the need for prior permission.

  • Monetization: Monetization through gameplay videos and streaming is allowed.

  • Game Title and Description:
    Including the game title in your video or stream title would make the developer happy!
    If you’re willing, please also add the following information in your description:

    Debug DeadLine
    Steam Store URL

We wholeheartedly support all your wonderful activities!
